_comment: Configuration for the CombinedStrategy dynamically mapping sub-strategies based on market regime.

DEFAULT_WEIGHTS._comment: Fallback weights when no regime is detected.

REGIME_STRONG_THRESHOLD._comment: Strong-signal override thresholds. For RANGING, the threshold is very high so trend signals don't falsely dominate.

REGIME_PRIORITY._comment: Priority order for which strategy is checked first when multiple emit strong signals.
